speaker: speaker1
text: So Janet , do you do any sports ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I go to the gym a lot . I am a member of a gym nearby .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , how often do you go ?

speaker: speaker2
text: About three times a week if I can .

speaker: speaker1
text: Not bad ! Do you do any other sports ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not really . I ’ d really like to try golf , though .
